ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the video file */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate of the video (e.g., 24fps, 30fps) */,
  "compression_format" TEXT /* Compression format of the video (e.g., H.264, H.265) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "total_frames" INTEGER /* Total number of frames in the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the video */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the frame in seconds */,
  "frame_data" TEXT /* Raw frame data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., person, vehicle, animal) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the object detection (0-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the detection belongs to */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object detected */,
  "x_ul" REAL /* x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "y_ul" REAL /* y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "w" REAL /* Width of the bounding box */,
  "h" REAL /* Height of the bounding box */,
  "pdet" REAL /* Probability of detection (0-1) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features extracted from the object (e.g., color, texture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being tracked */,
  "start_frame" INTEGER /* Starting frame number of the track */,
  "end_frame" INTEGER /* Ending frame number of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_detections" (
  "track_detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track detection */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the detection belongs to */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection */,
  "detection_time" REAL /* Time of detection in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_detections_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_detections_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object to detect */,
  "confidence_threshold" REAL /* Confidence threshold for object detection (0-1) */,
  "detection_algorithm" TEXT /* Detection algorithm used (e.g., YOLO, SSD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload the result belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for object detection */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection */,
  "result_time" REAL /* Time the result was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES uploads ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_time" REAL /* Time the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the visualization belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_time" REAL /* Time the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data (e.g., image, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)
